title: hieracium maculatum subsp. onosmotrichum
intro: Hieracium maculatum subsp. onosmotrichum, also known as spotted hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium maculatum subsp. onosmotrichum include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
